summary: Atlas source truth core was filed, executed, persisted to SQLite v0.2 tables, and committed as a concrete Speaker artifact. Canonical promotion remains NO because Speaker has no origin remote and both Speaker/Werkles have unclean state.

atlas_engine.persistence_layer: node:sqlite DatabaseSync writes snapshot_log and cross_verification_log rows into C:\speaker\db\speaker.sqlite

sqlite_v0_2_migration.trust_anchor_note: The trust_anchor table exists, but no trust anchor row was inserted because C:\speaker\LOCKS\operator_pubkey.asc was not present; C:\speaker\LOCKS contains only README.md.

blockers: Speaker has no origin remote configured.
Speaker still has untracked local surfaces outside this focused commit.
Werkles remains diverged from origin/snapshot/sally-good-werkles-2026-06-12: ahead 9, behind 9.
No operator_pubkey.asc trust anchor exists at C:\speaker\LOCKS\operator_pubkey.asc.

do_not_claim: Do not claim Atlas solved source truth synchronization.
Do not claim Speaker is canonical on GitHub.
Do not claim dirty Werkles is canonical.
Do not claim trust_anchor has a pinned operator key until operator_pubkey.asc is present and recorded.

next_best_packet.mission: Place or verify the operator public key at C:\speaker\LOCKS\operator_pubkey.asc, rerun atlas-source-truth.js, and verify trust_anchor receives a pinned hash/fingerprint row.
